overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character in a brown leather jacket walking along a harbor dock at dusk. The character moves from a paved section past other pedestrians onto a weathered wooden pier surrounded by moored sailboats in an overcast, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide paved harbor dock with moored sailboats

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved dock looking at the moored sailboats on the left side

entered.detail: wide light-colored paved walkway extending along the harbor
metal safety railing running along the right edge of the dock
dark cylindrical wooden pilings marking boat slips
sailboats with masts docked in the water to the left
low building with snow-dusted roof at the dock's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a wide paved dock at dusk. Moored sailboats line the left side while a metal railing runs along the right. The overcast sky creates a moody, low-light atmosphere with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved harbor dock with approaching pedestrians

events.description: group of pedestrians appears ahead walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock and approaching other pedestrians walking ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the dock in the same direction

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a small group of pedestrians also walking along the dock. The paved surface continues with sailboats still visible on the left, while the boathouse structure recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered wooden pier extension over water

events.description: dock surface changes from paved concrete to weathered wooden planks
character passes the last pedestrian and continues alone

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden section of the pier and continuing past the remaining pedestrian

notable_agents.action: last pedestrian walking ahead who is passed on the wooden section

entered.detail: weathered gray wooden planks forming the narrow pier surface
tall weathered wooden pilings with white bands marking boat slips

segments.scene_description: The dock transitions to weathered wooden planks as the character moves onto a narrower pier section. The character passes the final pedestrian and continues alone along the rustic wooden walkway surrounded by water and sailboats on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a harbor dock at dusk that transitions from a wide paved walkway into a rustic wooden pier. It begins with the character walking alone past moored sailboats under a moody, overcast sky, with a metal railing bordering the right side of the path. As the character progresses, the scene opens up to include a small group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while a boathouse structure recedes into the background. The paved surface then shifts into weathered wooden planks as the character moves onto a narrower pier section. Finally, the camera follows the character past the last pedestrian and further along the rustic walkway, now surrounded by water and sailboats on both sides.
